offer: For medical billing offices processing 10–20 invoices/month, inconsistent insurance eligibility verification causes cash flow gaps. We automate daily eligibility verification summaries instead of manual verification processes.
problem: Inconsistent insurance eligibility verification leads to delayed payments.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing help
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to 20-50 medical billing offices with demo
Community forums for medical billing tools sharing
try_it: Let users try daily summary generation and manual check interface
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
